1.content:
Mom runs into the Chief of police who has Bart in handcuffs saying that Bart stole a bulldozer and went around town destroying thing with it. The only I didn't have is a reason why your son stole it. How does mom get Bart to admit why he stole the bulldozer and else is he planning to do with it?

(a) she lets the Chief of police lock him up and hopes he'll admit it so he can be let out.
(b) follows him everywhere like he's a 2yr old.
(c) asks Milhouse if he knows anything about Bart and the bulldozer.
(d) she makes him take Maggie with him everywhere he goes and the only way mom will stop making him bring Maggie everywhere with is if he admits to why he stole the bulldozer.
1.title: Police catch Bart after a bulldozer is stolen

info.brief_description: Does mom find out early enough to stop him? Does Maggie end up lost at school?
info.description: Bart Simpson is at it again with another prank but this time involving a bulldozer. Mom follows Bart every where trying to get him to admit that he took the bulldozer. What happens next?
info.pretty_title: Bart Simpson and the missing bulldozer
